description: 84-line sprint review meeting with 4 speakers. First half covers completed work (past tense, no events). Second half schedules 8 follow-up meetings and check-ins. Tests ignoring past-tense work discussion and extracting only future scheduled events.

events.title: Sprint 15 Planning
events.reasoning: Alice schedules sprint 15 planning for Monday February 23rd at 10 AM for 2 hours in the team room with the full team.

events.title: 1-on-1 with Bob
events.reasoning: Alice schedules a 30-minute individual check-in with Bob on Monday February 23rd at 3 PM in her office.

events.title: 1-on-1 with Carol
events.reasoning: Alice schedules a 30-minute individual check-in with Carol on Tuesday February 24th at 9 AM in her office.

events.title: Payment Integration Design Review
events.reasoning: Bob requests and Alice confirms a technical design session for the payment integration on Tuesday February 24th at 2 PM for 90 minutes. Carol will attend the first 45 minutes only, but all four are nominally invited.

events.title: 1-on-1 with Dave
events.reasoning: Alice schedules a 30-minute individual check-in with Dave on Wednesday February 25th at 9 AM in her office.

events.title: Mockup Review
events.reasoning: Alice and Carol agree to a quick 30-minute internal mockup review on Wednesday February 25th at 2 PM before the customer call on Thursday.

events.title: Customer Advisory Board Call
events.reasoning: Alice schedules a customer advisory board call on Thursday February 26th at 11 AM for 1 hour with Alice, Bob, and Carol. Dave is explicitly excluded.

events.title: Sprint Retrospective
events.reasoning: Alice schedules the standard end-of-sprint retrospective for Friday February 27th at 2 PM for 1 hour with the full team.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 8 events: sprint planning (Mon 10 AM), Bob check-in (Mon 3 PM), Carol check-in (Tue 9 AM), payment design review (Tue 2 PM), Dave check-in (Wed 9 AM), mockup review (Wed 2 PM), customer advisory board call (Thu 11 AM), and sprint retro (Fri 2 PM). The completed sprint work discussion is past-tense and produces no calendar events.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. The first half of the transcript discusses completed sprint 14 work in past tense and should produce no events. All 8 events are scheduled in the second half of the meeting. Monday accessibility fix completion (Carol) is a task deadline, not a calendar event.
